query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_all,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status NOT IN ('terminated', 'billing_platform_stub') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_active,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'billing_platform_stub' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS billing_platform_stubs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'terminated' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS terminated
FROM services;
